$comment: Risk-tier policy template — data, not code. Consumed by tools/risk_gate.py. Tier = max(blast_radius, sensitivity); irreversible actions are floored at T2 (a human must ratify) but irreversibility alone never reaches T3 — T3 is for regulated data, mass external reach, or explicit rules. Rules may raise, never lower.

rules.why: money movement never below human_ratify, whatever the computed score
changing the rules IS the highest-risk action in the system
telos is human-authored only; agents may propose in L2, never write L4

notes: min_tier raises the computed tier, never lowers it — rules cannot weaken the computed floor
keep rules FEW; if you have 50 rules the dimensions are wrong
version this file and run its test cases (gate-cases) in CI on every change
